title: IDE-opened file context + task_notification emission (deferred from #516)
description:
Deferred part of #516. Blocked on:
- IDE bridge (#517) for <ide_opened_file> tag generation — needs editor to push file-opened events to OC
- Coordinator (#507) for task_notification bookends around subagent spawn/complete

Once #517 and #507 land, add:
- context.rs injection of <ide_opened_file path="X"> tags when the bridge reports an open file
- subagent.rs emitting task_notification system messages at spawn (<status>Started</status>) and at completion — same text shape Claude Code's cli/print.ts uses so transcripts are cross-readable

Compact boundary portion of #516 shipped in 339a872.
